# Stillgrid

> Stillgrid is a free online sudoku site — classic 9×9 plus the X-Sudoku, Jigsaw,
> and Killer variants. Difficulty is graded by the solving technique each puzzle
> actually requires (singles, pairs, X-Wing, Swordfish, chains), not by clue count
> or a timer. There is a daily challenge with streak tracking. Free to play,
> with no signup needed to start a puzzle. Made in a "quiet, meditative" style — sudoku, the quiet way.

## Variants

- [Classic Sudoku](https://stillgrid.app/classic): The original 9×9. Each row, column, and 3×3 box contains the digits 1–9 exactly once.
- [X-Sudoku](https://stillgrid.app/xsudoku): Classic rules plus both main diagonals must also contain 1–9. Also called diagonal sudoku.
- [Jigsaw Sudoku](https://stillgrid.app/jigsaw): Nine irregular connected regions replace the 3×3 boxes. Also called irregular or squiggly sudoku.
- [Killer Sudoku](https://stillgrid.app/killer): Dashed cages with target sums replace given digits; cage cells sum to the target with no repeats, on top of classic rules.

## About

- [How to play sudoku](https://stillgrid.app/learn): Rules, pencil-mark notes, and the technique ladder Stillgrid grades difficulty by — singles, pairs, pointing, X-Wing, and beyond.
- [Sudoku techniques: core](https://stillgrid.app/learn/core): Naked pair, hidden pair, and pointing pair — the Medium-tier techniques.
- [Sudoku techniques: advanced](https://stillgrid.app/learn/advanced): X-Wing, Swordfish, XY-Wing, and chains — the hardest patterns.
- [Sudoku variants & sizes](https://stillgrid.app/learn/variants): X-Sudoku, Jigsaw, Killer, and the 6×6/9×9/16×16 boards.
- [Stillgrid home](https://stillgrid.app/): Play any variant, the daily challenge, and track personal bests and streaks.
- [Privacy](https://stillgrid.app/privacy): No accounts and no tracking beyond privacy-friendly aggregate analytics; all game state stays in your browser.
